zh.lifeSummary: Sarah Chandler是Chandler和Mary Sleeper的女兒，於1644年出生在英國。她於1666年8月17日與Richard Smith在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1682年7月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可索爾茲伯里享年38歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sarah Chandler是Chandler和Mary Sleeper的女儿，于1644年出生在英国。她于1666年8月17日与Richard Smith在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1682年7月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可索爾茲伯里享年38岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州艾可索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Chandler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a maker and seller of candles, from Anglo-Norman French chandeler ‘maker or seller of candles’ (Old French chandelier, Late Latin candelarius, a derivative of candela ‘candle’). While a medieval chandler no doubt made and sold other articles beside candles, the extended sense of modern English chandler does not occur until the 16th century. The name may also, more rarely, have denoted someone who was responsible for the lighting arrangements in a large house, or else one who owed rent in the form of wax or candles.

variants.name: Candler
meanings: English (East Anglia and southeastern England): variant of   Chandler  .
German: variant of Kandler and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Candler is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: Sarah Chandler was born in 1644, in England as the daughter of Chandler and Mary Sleeper. She married Richard Smith on 17 August 1666, in Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 6 July 1682, in Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 38, and was buried in Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Sarah Chandler est née en 1644, à Angleterre, fille de Chandler et Mary Sleeper. Elle a épousé Richard Smith le 17 août 1666, à Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 juillet 1682, à Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Sarah Chandler wurde 1644 in England, als Tochter von Chandler und Mary Sleeper geboren. Sie hat am 17. August 1666 in Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Richard Smith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Juli 1682 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

Lei sposato Richard Smith il 17 agosto 1666, nel Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Chandlerは1644年にイギリスでChandlerとMary Sleeperの娘として生まれた。1666年8月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスサリスブリーでRichard Smithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1682年7月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスサリスブリーで38歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살리스버이
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Chandler(은)는 1644년 영국에서 Chandler(와)과 Mary Sleeper의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1666년 8월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살리스버이에서 Richard Smith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1682년 7월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살리스버이에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sarah Chandler nasceu em 1644, em Inglaterra filha de Chandler e Mary Sleeper. Ela casou-se com Richard Smith em 17 de agosto de 1666, em Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de julho de 1682, em Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Sarah Chandler родилась в 1644 г. в местности Англия. Её родителей звали Chandler и Mary Sleeper. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Smith 17 августа 1666 г. в местности салисбури, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 6 июля 1682 г. в местности салисбури, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности салисбури, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Sarah Chandler nació en 1644, en Inglaterra como hija de Chandler y Mary Sleeper. Se casó con Richard Smith el 17 de agosto de 1666, en Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 6 de julio de 1682, en Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Salisbury, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
